violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of bar sink in the front service area and on the platform in the food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The floor tiles and wall tiles (near bar opening) in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repai Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Unapproved rodenticide observed in the establishment. Establishment is not permitted to use any unapproved rodenticide on the premises. All rodenticide shall be applied by a licensed pest control technician. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Dead roaches were observed throughout the establishment. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Wood is used in the construction of bar sink in the front service area and on the platform in the food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The floor tiles and wall tiles (near bar opening) in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Food was observed held at 57-64 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the prep unit since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Per person in charge, prep unit was accidently unplugged. Prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Prep unit must be adjusted/repaired/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
Unapproved rodenticide observed in the establishment. Rodenticide was removed from the premises at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area and basement area. Per person in charge, pest control services the establishment on a weekly basis. Establishment is to routinely inspect all high activity areas. All food/non-food contact areas to be cleaned and sanitized. All single service items, food, and equipment to be stored to prevent possible contamination from roaches. Pest control records were reviewed during time of inspection. Establishment must continue pest control services until pest issue is under control. Please email inspector weekly updates/invoices. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2024

Wood is used in the construction of bar sink in the front service area and on the platform in the food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. The establishment is to continue weekly pest control inspections. All equipment, utensils, and single service items to be stored in a manner to prevent contamination of roaches and insecticides/rodenticides that is distributed by the pest control technician. Plan of action to be followed daily. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Wood is used in the construction of bar sink in the front service area and on the platform in the food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Ladder was observed blocking the hand sink in the kitchen. Staff moved to appropriate area. Single service items observed with the bar hand sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Eggs observed over RTE foods (cheese, octopus, etc.). Staff moved to proper location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Various foods observed between 46-51 degrees Fahrenheit in the 3 door refrigerator and salad prep unit. Per PIC, all foods were taken from the walk-in cooler and put in the units 2 hours prior to inspection. All foods moved to the walk-in to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Multiple items in the refrigeration units observed without date marking. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Unapproved rodenticide observed in the establishment. PIC notified to remove rodenticide from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The presence of roaches are not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the kitchen and dining room area. Per PIC, the establishment is serviced 1x weekly by pest control. Establishment is to routinely inspect all high activity areas. All food/non-food contact areas to be cleaned and sanitized. All single service items, food, and equipment to be stored to prevent possible contamination from roaches. Estabilshment and pest control to develop plan of action for aiding in the elimination of roaches. Plan of action to be sent to inspector by 8/19/24. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The 3 door refrigerator and salad prep unit observed in poor repair (maintaining an ambient temperature of 46 degrees Fahrenheit and 55 Degrees Fahrenheit respectively). Units not to be used until it can be repaired/serviced/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
The floors under the cookline and under the 3-bay sink have an accumulation of food and other debris. Areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
